indexes.expression: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX combo_items_combo_product_unique ON public.combo_items USING btree (combo_id, product_id) WHERE (product_id IS NOT NULL)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX combo_items_combo_service_unique ON public.combo_items USING btree (combo_id, service_id) WHERE (service_id IS NOT NULL)

checks.name: combo_items_polymorphic_check
checks.definition: CHECK ((((item_type = 'service'::combo_item_type) AND (service_id IS NOT NULL) AND (product_id IS NULL)) OR ((item_type = 'product'::combo_item_type) AND (product_id IS NOT NULL) AND (service_id IS NULL))))
checks.expression: ((item_type = 'service'::combo_item_type) AND (service_id IS NOT NULL) AND (product_id IS NULL)) OR ((item_type = 'product'::combo_item_type) AND (product_id IS NOT NULL) AND (service_id IS NULL))

indexes.expression: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX tenants_name_no_parent_unique ON public.tenants USING btree (name) WHERE (parent_tenant_id IS NULL)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX tenants_name_parent_unique ON public.tenants USING btree (name, parent_tenant_id) WHERE (parent_tenant_id IS NOT NULL)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX tenants_slug_unique ON public.tenants USING btree (slug) WHERE (slug IS NOT NULL)
